details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Memory Foam, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Waterproof

about_item: EGG CRATE MEMORY FOAM - The dog couch is filled with double layers of foam, the top egg crate memory foam provides a good amount of softness and pressure reduction. This soft pet bed is especially suitable for elder dogs in need of extra cushioning and support.

L-SHAPED DESIGN - EHEYCIGA orthopedic dog bed has a specific and unique l-shaped design, which provides extra support for your pet's neck and head so that your furry friend can have a more restful sleep.

WATERPROOF FILM & LINEN-LIKE SIDE - There is a waterproof film between the flannel surface and the bottom fabric, which can effectively protect the dog sofa and increase the durability.The side of the dog couch bed is a layer of linen-like fabric to add breathability, but it is not waterproof.

SOFT SLEEPING SURFACE & ANTI-SLIP BOTTOM - This large dog sofa bed has a super soft flannel sleeping surface on the outside. It enhances the comfort of the dog bed and provides a cozy sleeping area for your pet. The bottom is equipped with non-slip points to keep it steady.

EASY TO CLEAN - Our washable dog couch with removable cover has zipper closure and can be easily cleaned. Please note that the inner foam is not washable. After receiving it, leave it for 24-48h for rebound.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, comfortable, and spacious, with super soft material and great value for money. They appreciate its washability, being able to remove the cover for cleaning, and one customer mentions it's perfect for their large dog. The durability and thickness receive mixed reviews - while some say it holds up well, others report issues with seams coming apart, and while some like the thickness, others find it too thin.

authors_reviews.title: Great support for large dogs with joint issues! 🐾🐕‍🦺
authors_reviews.text: I bought this bed for my 3 year old Labradoodle who has hip dysplasia, and it has made a noticeable difference for him. The memory foam is firm but comfortable and provides excellent support for his hips and joints. He seems more comfortable getting up after resting and settles into this bed much faster than his previous one.The size is perfect for a large dog who likes to stretch out, and the bed doesn’t flatten out after use. I also really appreciate the waterproof liner and removable, washable cover.Overall, this bed feels well made, supportive, and absolutely worth the price. I would highly recommend it for large dogs, especially those with hip dysplasia or other joint issues. 🦴🤍☁️
authors_reviews.author: 𝖪𝗋𝗂𝗌𝗍𝖾𝗇

authors_reviews.title: Great dog bed for the price
authors_reviews.text: This is an amazing dog bed. It is very large and fits our 95 lb labradoodle with ease. The quality for the price is beyond what was expected and the color (orange) is stunning. It is soft, yet very sturdy. All three of our large dogs love it. Totally recommend considering this product
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Good size for Mastiff
authors_reviews.text: Good size for larger dogs (mastiffs, Great Pyrenees)- the really like the bolsters, able to curl up or sprawl out. Within 3 days, even the most suspicious of the crew was utilizing. Foam is comfortable and not too firm or too squishy. Nice quality cover. Beds do not slide on hardwood floors. No noticeable odor, soft and attractive fabric. Lightweight-can be easily positioned
authors_reviews.author: S. Jones

authors_reviews.title: My dog loves it!!
authors_reviews.text: This is a really nice pet bed. My dog really loves it. It took two days to fully fill out and it was easy to place inside of the cover. Immediately my dog hopped on and rolled up on her new bed. She weighs 100lbs and has plenty of room to spare. I absolutely love it, and I love the fact that it’s also washable. I can remove the sponge and wash the cover.
authors_reviews.author: Torre Manning

authors_reviews.title: Updated review on this dog bed.
authors_reviews.text: UPDATE (4): I have increased rating to 4 stars because the pillow has finally expanded and the crease has relaxed. Possibly the foam was frozen before delivery? It was that week we got hit with the arctic cold. I'm not sure what happened but it took weeks instead of days for this foam to regulate. It may be from my dogs walking and laying on it but it finally filled in the pillow cover. It's still not as full as the first one we bought which I loved,but it's a lot better than it was that first week, and it's a great size, a nice sturdy cover, and my dogs like it. UPDATE (3): I have decided to keep this pillow. The cover is nice, sturdy, and zips off for cleaning. The other pillow I bought has held up and washed nicely. The foam on this one is still misshapen and did not fully expand but I couldn't get it back in the package and decided it's worth keeping for the cover. Gave it 3 stars because I really liked the first one I bought. ORIGINAL REVIEW (1): I had already bought this bed for my dogs and loved it, so I decided to buy a second one. The bed came today and 10 hrs later it's still disfigured. It's not expanding the way the first one did and it's misshapen in such a way that I do not think it will be able to lie flat. How do you return an item that came vacuum packed? I can't get it back in the small box it came in. The first bed I bought is wonderful, it expanded beautifully right away, I was able to slip the cover on within hours. This pillow has a long raised crease down the middle, I don't think it will flatten out and is not expanding as it should. I will change my review if I wake tomorrow after giving it a full 24 hrs to expand. I gave it 2 stars only because I loved the first bed I ordered. UPDATE (2): See 3rd pic, bed is still misshapen, refolded on itself during the night, this is 24 hrs later. Nothing can be done with this bed, it will not lie flat. I will get it back into its original packaging and back to Amazon it will go. Not sure what happened here but the foam was clearly damaged some how and will not expand.
authors_reviews.author: My Honest Review

authors_reviews.title: Nice dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: This bed has been holding up well for my puppy. It’s a good size, not too big or too small, and it’s sturdy but soft and comfortable for her.
authors_reviews.author: FitDaddy

authors_reviews.title: Dog Bed
authors_reviews.text: Nice, soft and thick bed. Great for medium to small dogs. I got this to go in my large dog crate. It is too small to fit the length of the crate. My other 2 dogs love it but, it is too small for my large dog. Highly recommend. Really nice bed.
authors_reviews.author: Nnacho

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Quality and Comfort
authors_reviews.text: An excellent purchase. The material is high quality, and it is very comfortable.
authors_reviews.author: Nicolas Gomez
